playbook.intent: Drifting feature flags → weekly tech-lead+PM review with explicit per-flag verdict (dark / ramp / GA / kill).
playbook.scope: Tech lead + PM review every open feature flag once a week. For each flag, the verdict is one of: keep dark / ramp / GA / kill. Decision criteria are explicit (SLO impact, error rate, adoption metric, business intent). Flags that drift out of lifecycle get auto-flagged for deletion. The session ends with a written log of decisions and a flag-killswitch list.

success-criteria.criterion: Every open flag carries a verdict each week
Killswitch path verified for any GA-pending flag

stage.name: Inventory + classify
stage.intent: List flags by lifecycle stage; spot drift.

tasks.task: Pull open flags from code + flag platform
Flag any stale / orphaned flags for kill

outputs.output: Flag inventory with lifecycle stage tags

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every flag is mapped to one of: dark / ramp / GA-pending / drifting.

stage.name: Apply decision criteria
stage.intent: Walk SLO + error + adoption + business-intent signals per flag.

tasks.task: Pull SLO + error-rate + adoption metrics per flag
Confirm test coverage on flagged paths

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each flag has at least one quantitative signal supporting the proposed verdict. No vibes-only decisions.

stage.name: Verdict + commit
stage.intent: Write the verdict per flag; remove dead flags.

tasks.task: Per-flag verdict: dark / ramp / GA / kill

stage.decision-gate: Required: written verdict per flag. Unresolved flags carry forward but must be tagged 'unresolved-prev-week'.

extra.value: [Flag implementation choice — covered by feature-flags-* methodologies, Feature delivery — see rfc-to-production-feature-delivery, Engineering of the kill-switch — assumed already implemented]
[Flag inventory tracked in version control, SLO + error-rate metrics wired per flag, Trunk-based + flag-aware development discipline]

[Flags marked 'GA' but the killswitch was never tested — discovers at first incident, Dark flags accumulate quarter-over-quarter — code rot, Decisions live in head-of-lead — bus-factor failure, Kill verdicts that aren't scheduled — flag never actually disappears]
['Can I name every open flag''s owner and lifecycle stage?', 'Did any flag get killed this week?', 'Was the kill-switch on any GA-pending flag verified inside 24h?']

{human: faion get-content feature-flag-rollout-decision --format md, agent: faion get-content feature-flag-rollout-decision --format context, json: faion get-content feature-flag-rollout-decision --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
